name: ꕥ  Royal RPG
description: 🌓 - Insert yourself into a royalty-based roleplay. The possibilities are endless! Are you a notorious thief snooping around the kingdom, getting your grubby hands on all that's good and gold? Are you the king's favorite servant, on your knees for his every word- for better or worse? Maybe you're a dolorous princess that was kidnapped at birth, unaware of your stolen destiny. Maybe you're a fierce knight by day and a dragon tamer by night- or maybe you are the dragon! Whatever path you decide to take, it's yours; don't let anyone tell you otherwise.
creator: Diamondstripe1
